editor.body_hint: Start writing… or tap the mic to record.

voice.unavailable: Speech recognition isn't available on this device.
voice.failed: Couldn't recognize speech. Please try again.
voice.lang_missing: This language isn't installed for voice input, so recording uses your device's default language.
voice.lang_missing_hint: To add it: Settings → System → Languages & input → Voice input / On-device speech recognition → download the language.

ai_errors.rate_limit: You've hit the free AI usage limit for now. Wait a minute, then try again.
ai_errors.not_configured: AI features aren't set up yet. Add your API key to enable them.
ai_errors.network: No internet connection. Connect and try again.
ai_errors.timeout: The AI request took too long. Check your connection and try again.
ai_errors.auth: The AI API key is invalid. Please check your setup.
ai_errors.permission: This API key isn't allowed to use the AI model.
ai_errors.overloaded: The AI service is busy right now. Try again in a moment.
ai_errors.server: The AI service ran into a problem. Try again shortly.
ai_errors.invalid_request: The AI couldn't process this note. Try adjusting the text.
ai_errors.empty: The AI didn't return a result. Please try again.
ai_errors.unknown: Something went wrong with the AI. Please try again.
